title: Event payload: project.tool.registered (v0.1)
description: Payload shape for project.tool.registered events. Declares a tool's identity, metadata, and schema in the project. tool_call events reference a tool via toolRef matching this event's toolId. This event is project-state, not run-scoped.

toolId.description: Stable identifier for the tool across versions. Referenced from tool_call.toolRef.

toolVersionId.description: Identifier of this specific version of the tool. MAY be omitted if the implementer does not version tools.

name.description: Human-readable display name. Implementers SHOULD provide at least a name.

description.description: Human-readable description of what the tool does.

owner.description: Who owns / maintains the tool. Open shape.

schema.description: Schema describing the tool's input and/or output. Open shape. Typical fields: 'input' (a JSON Schema or $ref to one), 'output' (a JSON Schema or $ref to one). Protobuf or other descriptor formats are permitted; implementers SHOULD prefer JSON Schema for interop.

implementation.description: How the tool is implemented. Open shape. Typical fields: 'type' (e.g. 'rest', 'function', 'mcp_server', 'subprocess'), 'endpoint', 'hash' (content hash of the implementation).

effectiveAt.description: When this registration takes effect. MAY differ from envelope occurredAt.

supersedes.description: toolVersionId of the previous version this registration replaces.
